reviews.review_title: App no longer loading my scenes.
reviews.review_description: I keep trying to upload a scene and the VR app on the head set wont work. Also it is very frustrating that the app wont handle any file bigger then 500MB. I want to find an alternative.

developer_response.body:
Hello MohawkCampbell , 

If you’re working with large files, SimLab provides powerful optimization tools to make your scenes run smoothly.
Have you tried optimizing your scene for Oculus Quest?

👉 Learn more about scene optimization in this short video: https://youtu.be/t1SAAavKrcA

💬 Need more help with large scenes? Join the SimLab Discord community to get tips and guidance: https://www.simlab-soft.com/simlab-discord-community.aspx

reviews.review_description: It’s impossible to import .vrpackage file into application without using the cloud. And the cloud is available only via paid subscription.

developer_response.body:
Hello , 
Thank you for your feedback .
You can upload up to 3 Models for free for 1 year  to be able to show your models through Meta Quest devices.

reviews.review_title: Simlab VR Viwer unable to run my models
reviews.review_description: I have been trying all methods to run my models into Simlab VR viewer on my meta Oculus quest. Till now as soon as I run them the circle turn red with 00. nothing after that and I have to quite. Even few of the Simlab mdeols like piano are not getting loaded. I don't know what to say, first mete horizon didn't let me to connect my oculus, as safety video was not running in my andriod phone for which I have to download meta quest app apk and now this. Afte all the labour putinto maing the model, now it is not even fulfilling the basic requirements.

developer_response.body:
Hello Biswas_KNO, 
Thank you for your feedback and we are sorry for this! 

the Red circle with 00 value is Shown when you are using an old version of the application  to run a model that is generated by SimLab Composer or SimLab VRStudio with higher version.

Can you please check the version's numbers of Both SimLab Composer and SimLabVRViewer To be able to solve your issue.

SimLab Models That are coming with the Application  need the latest version of SimLab VRViewer . 

You can update the application for Free.

If this Not help you , Please inform us .

reviews.review_description: Hate the fact you have to sign something

developer_response.body:
Hello noahtaylor12, 
Thank you for your feedback .
There are many free models in SimLabModels Tab that you can explore them without any login. 
but for your private models, absolutely you need to  login to show them . this will give you the ability to show any model you have through Meta quest devices.
if you have any questions, please Don't hesitate to contact us Again.

reviews.review_title: Best in class (easy SketchUp to VR)
reviews.review_description:
Best is class sketchup to VR app! In the quick list below I’ll try to summarize in the “pros” things that SimLabVR does better than SentioVR and in the list of “cons” things that SentioVR does better.

Pros:
Simple to use and effective material selection, which makes a huge difference in the final looks of the rendering.
Render looks even better in PC VR mode.
Sun, sky, and environment settings.
Grab and move objects around! This one is awesome!
Personalize the user’s virtual hands to any 3D model of your choice.
Download and test objects like furniture and trees directly into the VR scene.
X-ray view teleportation mode looks cool.
Upload up to 3 models to your free account for Oculus standalone experience (no need for a VR ready PC) with no time limit or finite demo period. 

Cons:
Texture render is sometimes buggy, with several inverted faces and missing textures (as compared to what you see in SketchUp). This is probably the biggest flaw of this app right now.
Mis-inverted faces can cause “false floors”, where the user falls into infinity. Very uncomfortable.
Free flight mode can`t go thru walls and floors and other objects in VR.
Right hand teleport range is too short. It should be possible to jump to distant objects in the VR scene.
It should automatically convert the SketchUp Scenes into VR Cameras, instead of requiring the user to create new ones in SimLabVR Studio.
No easy way to change the user’s height while in VR.

I really hope the devs address the cons at some point.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback.
it's our pleasure that you like out application .

if You have any question, please don't hesitate to Contact us.

reviews.review_description: This app is easy to use and integrates well with SketchUp. I am currently in the process of designing a new home. I have used SketchUP and this app to preview my design before ever hammering a nail. SketchUp colors are a little off, you need to play with the materials in the VR SimLab app to get them right. Overall, fantastic app. Really enjoying it.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback.
it's our pleasure that you like out application .

if You have any question, please don't hesitate to Contact us.

reviews.review_description:
Having it run completely on Quest 2 is a really nice idea.  But It will need some work...

Some things that need to be fixed.

Teleport moving is impossible after one teleport move you keep on falling.
The app completely crashes the Oculus and requires a forced shutdown after a small minute.
The account login is continuously forgetting that you are logged in.
The keyboard looks out of focus since the resolution is terrible.
In the loading screen there seems to be a black Quest controller on the ground.

And some small things.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback and we are sorry for this ! 
Can you please update the application to the latest version ? We worked on adding many features and enhancements to the application This should solve your issue . We are waiting to hear from you again

reviews.review_description:
reply to developers:

Thanks for the reply.
wouldn't there be hope for a future that this app will be expanded and these features will be brought into the standalone app? or even better, create a new standalone app that can do these things here? (to avoid using a PC) what type of PC do you currently need? Thank you
especially if this would only be a viewer of experiences already created, why do you give me the opportunity to add objects and not give me the opportunity to delete and start a new environment? and you won't give me the passthrough? do you understand what I mean? if it is a viewer it shouldn't even have the function of adding objects for example, or moving them, etc. and then either you do something complete or you reduce it to a viewer. because in this way if I see that I have the opportunity to add objects, move them, resize them, I then expect all the other functions, first of all the possibility of starting a new empty environment.
grettings 


------



I would like this app to let me create an empty room where I can arrange furniture, chairs and tables, but I can't!

I wish it had passthrough so I could place objects in the passthrough environment and change the size of objects at will

but the only thing I can do is add objects to an already existing scenario and change the size of the objects

I would also like to be able to create open environments

----------+





very cool app but not what it should be. from the viewer you could create a virtual environment, a room, a house, an outdoor place with trees and rocks. ability to build something with blocks that you can enlarge and change shape. a bit like the room demo, you have to be able to add objects as you like and then save the project and see it later, walking through it, and you should also be able to grab objects. and instead you have to do it from a computer and it's all very cumbersome and complex. instead from the viewer you can do it

developer_response.body:
Hello massimo, 
Thank you for your feedback.
SimLabVRViewer Application is designed to deal with models that are created by SimLab VRStudio or SimLab Composer Softwares.

You can design the needed experience there with many options and features. 

Please check https://simlab-soft.com/

reviews.review_description:
I would be happy to help you write a customer support review for SimLab Soft VR!

SimLab Soft VR is a fantastic software company that provides top-notch customer support. I recently had the pleasure of working with their customer support team, and I can confidently say that they exceeded my expectations.

Firstly, the response time was incredibly fast. I reached out to their support team with a question, and I received a response within hours. The team was very friendly and professional, and they went above and beyond to ensure that my issue was resolved quickly and efficiently.

Secondly, the team was extremely knowledgeable about the software. They were able to answer all of my questions and provide me with helpful resources to guide me through the process. Their expertise was evident in their clear and concise explanations, which made it easy for me to understand and implement their recommendations.

Overall, I highly recommend SimLab Soft VR to anyone in need of reliable customer support. Their team is dedicated, knowledgeable, and always willing to go the extra mile to help their customers. Thank you, SimLab Soft VR, for providing such excellent service!

Thank you for Your feedback.
We appreciate that you like the application. 

if you have any question , please don't hesitate to contact us.

reviews.review_description:
i can't login on oculus quest 2 that show connection failed. 
How can I do?

Early days playing with this but works pretty well on the whole.
Yes, of course it is a viewer for content created in the Simlab Composer software. It doesnt really do anything else unless you want to just explore the sample files included.
Simlab software has to be the easiest way to get 3D environments onto the Oculus Quest. Unless you want to dive into the super complex Unit/unreal game engines.

I use it for taking my cad models from solidworks and getting them onto the Quset to share with my clients. With the use of Visualize you can get animations on here too. The Training builder allows multiple interactions.

If this is your thing check out the software on their website. Very reasonably priced and lots of great training videos.

I am a long time user but not linked to the company in any way.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback.
it's our pleasure that you like out application .

if You have any question, please don't hesitate to Contact us.
